channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NIRAJ] Niraj Cement Structurals Ltd Receives Work Orders Worth Rs. 180.65 Crores Including GST
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Niraj Cement Structurals Ltd has received work orders from Ministry of Road Transport and Highways (MoRTH), Public Works Department (PWD) of Odisha, and National Highways Authority of India (NHAI). The combined worth of these work orders is Rs. 180.65 Crores including GST. The first order from MoRTH is for the construction of two vehicular underpasses in Maharashtra. The second order from PWD of Odisha is for the construction of a new minor bridge in Odisha. The third order from NHAI is for the construction of a flyover and approach roads in the Puintola to Icchapuram section of NH-16 in Odisha. All these orders are on EPC mode.

  • Niraj Cement Structurals Ltd has received work orders from MoRTH, PWD of Odisha, and NHAI.
  • The combined worth of these work orders is Rs. 180.65 Crores including GST.
  • The first order from MoRTH is for the construction of two vehicular underpasses in Maharashtra.
  • The second order from PWD of Odisha is for the construction of a new minor bridge in Odisha.
  • The third order from NHAI is for the construction of a flyover and approach roads in the Puintola to Icchapuram section of NH-16 in Odisha.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NIRAJ CEMENT STRUCTURALS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ZENITHEXPO] Zenith Exports Ltd Appoints Mrs. Priyanka Poddar and Mr. Subhajeet Kar as Independent Directors
item.description:
Zenith Exports Ltd has appointed Mrs. Priyanka Poddar and Mr. Subhajeet Kar as Additional Directors in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Directors for a first term of 5 (five) consecutive years commencing from 06™ March’2026. Mrs. Poddar is a company secretary and board director with 3 years of experience, while Mr. Kar is a Senior Finance & Commercial Leader with 26+ years of experience across multinational, public-sector, and technology-driven organizations. The appointments are subject to approval of the shareholders of the Company to be obtained within three months hereof.

  • Zenith Exports Ltd appoints two new Independent Directors
  • Mrs. Priyanka Poddar is a company secretary and board director with 3 years of experience
  • Mr. Subhajeet Kar is a Senior Finance & Commercial Leader with 26+ years of experience
  • Appointments are subject to approval of the shareholders within three months
  • New Directors' term starts from 06™ March’2026 for a period of 5 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZENITH EXPORTS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [KACL] Kaiser Corporation Ltd: Promoter Amav Enterprises Private Limited Sells Shares Worth INR 21,243,601.8
item.description:
Pursuant to Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, Kaiser Corporation Ltd. has received a disclosure from promoter Amav Enterprises Private Limited regarding the sale of shares. The sale includes 5,00,000 shares at a value of INR 21,243,601.8. The disclosure was made on 6th March 2026.

  • Promoter Amav Enterprises Private Limited sells 5,00,000 shares of Kaiser Corporation Ltd.
  • The total value of the shares sold is INR 21,243,601.8.
  • The sale was disclosed on 6th March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaiser Corporation Limited | Category: Deals

item.title: [KVSCASTING] KVS Castings Ltd: Board Meeting Outcome Includes Shifting of Registered Office and New CEO Appointment
item.description:
KVS Castings Ltd held a board meeting on March 6, 2026, during which they decided to shift the registered office to Village Baghelewala and Girdhiyai, Tehsil Kashipur, Distt- Udham Singh Nagar, Uttarakhand - 244713. The meeting also resulted in the appointment of Mr. Sanjay Rajeshwar Agarwal as the Chief Executive Officer and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of the company. Mr. Agarwal holds a Master’s Degree in Science and a PG Diploma in Management with over 39 years of experience in Metallurgy, Foundries, Automobile and Business Management.

  • Shifting of Registered office of the Company to Village Baghelewala and Girdhiyai, Tehsil Kashipur, Distt- Udham Singh Nagar, Uttarakhand - 244713
  • Appointment of Mr. Sanjay Rajeshwar Agarwal as Chief Executive Officer and KMP of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KVS Castings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AVROIND] Avro India Ltd Announces Extraordinary General Meeting on March 30, 2026
item.description:
Avro India Ltd has announced that the Board of Directors at their meeting held on March 06, 2026, approved the Notice of Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Company. The EGM will be held on Monday, March 30, 2026, at 01:00 p.m. (IST) through Video Conference (VC)/Other Audio-Visual Means (OAVM). The Notice of the EGM will be shared in due course. The Company is providing remote e-voting facility to its members to cast their vote electronically for all resolutions set out in the notice of EGM. The remote e-voting period for the EGM will commence on Friday, March 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. and ends on Sunday, March 29, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. (both days inclusive). The cut-off date for determining the eligibility of shareholders to exercise remote e-voting rights and attendance at EGM is Monday, March 23, 2026.

  • Avro India Ltd announced Extraordinary General Meeting on March 30, 2026
  • The meeting will be held through Video Conference (VC)/Other Audio-Visual Means (OAVM)
  • The Company is providing remote e-voting facility for all resolutions set out in the notice of EGM
  • The remote e-voting period for the EGM will commence on March 27, 2026, and ends on March 29, 2026
  • The cut-off date for determining the eligibility of shareholders is March 23, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avro India Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BLUECHIPT] Bluechip Tex Industries Ltd Approves Revised Related Party Transactions Policy for FY 2026-27 and Sets EGM Date
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Bluechip Tex Industries Ltd held a meeting on a certain date and time. During the meeting, they considered and adopted the revised Related Party Transactions Policy of the Company for the financial year 2026-27. The Board also approved a material related party transaction proposed for the same financial year, subject to the approval of the shareholders. Furthermore, the Board fixed Tuesday, 31st March, 2026 at 12.30 p.m. as the date for convening the 1%t Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Company for the financial year ended 31%t March, 2026 and approved the draft Notice of the EGM.

  • Board approved revised Related Party Transactions Policy for FY 2026-27
  • Approval given for a material RPT proposed for FY 2026-27, subject to shareholder approval
  • Date set for 1%t Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) for the financial year ending 31%t March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE CHIP TEX INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZENITHEXPO] Zenith Exports Ltd Appoints Two New Independent Directors and Reconstitutes Committees
item.description:
Zenith Exports Ltd announced the appointment of Mrs. Priyanka Poddar and Mr. Subhajeet Kar as Additional Directors in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Directors. The appointments are subject to the approval of the shareholders within three months. The company also informed about the sudden demise of Mr. Sanjay Kumar Shaw and reconstitution of the Audit Committee and Stake Holder Relationship Committee. The Board also addressed the non-compliance of Regulation 17(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Appointment of Mrs. Priyanka Poddar and Mr. Subhajeet Kar as Additional Directors
  • Reconstitution of the Audit Committee and Stake Holder Relationship Committee
  • Addressing the non-compliance of Regulation 17(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
  • Sudden demise of Mr. Sanjay Kumar Shaw

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZENITH EXPORTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AXISBANK] Axis Bank Considers Amalgamation Proposal with Max Financial Services
item.description:
Axis Bank Limited and its subsidiaries, Axis Securities Limited and Axis Capital Limited, have received a proposal from Max Financial Services Limited to amalgamate Max Financial with Axis Max Life Insurance Limited. The proposal is subject to requisite approvals, including approval from the Axis Entities. Axis Entities have provided an in-principle no objection to the proposal, subject to certain conditions. Max Financial has executed an undertaking in favor of the Axis Entities, confirming the terms and conditions of the existing transaction documents.

  • Axis Bank and its subsidiaries have received a proposal from Max Financial Services to amalgamate Max Financial with Axis Max Life Insurance Limited.
  • The proposal is subject to requisite approvals, including approval from the Axis Entities.
  • Axis Entities have provided an in-principle no objection to the proposal, subject to certain conditions.
  • Max Financial has executed an undertaking in favor of the Axis Entities, confirming the terms and conditions of the existing transaction documents.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AXIS BANK LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics Ltd. Reports Q3 and Nine Months Results for FY2025-26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fractal Analytics Limited has reported its unaudited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and nine months ended December 31, 2025. The results have been subjected to limited review by B S R & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants. The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives will remain closed until March 7, 2026, in accordance with Fractal's Code on Prohibition of Insider Trading and SEBI regulations.

  • Unaudited consolidated and standalone financial results for Q3 and nine months ended December 31, 2025
  • Subjected to limited review by B S R & Co. LLP, Chartered Accountants
  • Trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives to remain closed until March 7, 2026
  • Results to be uploaded on the company's website: https://fractal.ai/investor-relations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ZENITHEXPO] Zenith Exports Ltd Appoints Mrs. Priyanka Poddar and Mr. Subhajeet Kar as Independent Directors
item.description:
Zenith Exports Ltd has appointed Mrs. Priyanka Poddar and Mr. Subhajeet Kar as Additional Directors in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Directors. Mrs. Poddar, aged about 41 years, is a highly professional and qualified company secretary and board director with 3 years of experience in leading organizations. Mr. Kar, aged about 53 years, is a Senior Finance & Commercial Leader with 26+ years of experience across multinational, public-sector, and technology-driven organizations in India, APAC, MEA, and OECD markets. Both directors are not related to any of the Promoters, Members of the Promoter Group and Directors of the Company and are not debarred from holding the office of Director by virtue of any Securities Exchange Board of India order or any other such authority.

  • Zenith Exports Ltd has appointed two new Independent Directors, Mrs. Priyanka Poddar and Mr. Subhajeet Kar.
  • Mrs. Poddar is a highly professional and qualified company secretary and board director with 3 years of experience.
  • Mr. Kar is a Senior Finance & Commercial Leader with 26+ years of experience across various sectors and markets.
  • Both directors are not related to any of the Promoters, Members of the Promoter Group and Directors of the Company.
  • The appointments are subject to approval of the Shareholders within three months.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ZENITH EXPORTS LTD. | Category: Management Change
